text:
Created attachment 181327
diff of changes made to file

Found on this page: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/ports-finding-applications.html

Subversion is written entirely in lowercase on this page, yet is capitalized on other pages. Additionally, the phrasing of "in case of ports", and "In case of Subversion" is grammatically incorrect. Attached is a diff including corrections.
